modules.title: Hacking WordPress
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches the fundamentals of attacking and defending WordPress sites through 16 sections, 8 exercises, and assessments, covering its structure and common vulnerabilities.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Linux Fundamentals
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Network Enumeration with Nmap
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches fundamentals of using Nmap for network enumeration, including host discovery, port scanning, service enumeration, and more, over 7 hours.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Cracking Passwords with Hashcat
modules.summary: This module teaches the fundamentals of password cracking using Hashcat, including techniques for various hash types encountered in security assessments.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Introduction to Bash Scripting
concepts: T1059.003 - Execute Commands via File System
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Active Directory LDAP
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module covers Active Directory and LDAP enumeration using built-in tools, including 12 sections, 8 exercises, and an assessment, spanning 2 days.
concepts: Command Line Tools for AD Enumeration
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: File Inclusion
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module covers file inclusion vulnerabilities, including LFI, RFI, and RCE, across multiple sections and exercises to equip infosec pros with the skills to identify and mitigate these risks.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: File Transfers
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module covers file transfer techniques using built-in OS utilities for Windows and Linux, including methods, detection, and evasion, across 10 sections with 5 interactive exercises.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Kerberos Attacks
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module covers advanced Kerberos attacks, including common attacks, AD delegation abuse, persistence, and lateral movement, over 23 sections and 17 interactive exercises.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: DNS Enumeration Using Python
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches DNS enumeration via Python, covering tool development, querying DNS records, and security, with 11 sections and 7 interactive exercises.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: OSINT: Corporate Recon
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module focuses on OSINT for security assessments, covering gathering public info on companies and personnel, using network leaks, and more; estimated 2 days, Hard tier.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Stack-Based Buffer Overflows on Linux x86
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches buffer overflow exploitation on Linux x86, covering theory, practical exercises, and prevention techniques.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: SQL Injection Fundamentals
modules.summary: This module teaches the fundamentals of SQL injection, covering its risks and implementation in web apps, through 17 sections, 12 interactive exercises, and 1 assessment, estimated at 8 hours.
concepts: Web Shell Deployment via SQL Injection
MITRE T1550.004 - Data from Local System via API
MITRE T1563.001 - Remote Code Execution via Web Shell
MITRE T1564.002 - File and Directory Discovery
MITRE T1565 - Data from Local System via Database
MITRE T1567 - SQL Injection for Privilege Escalation
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Introduction to Networking
modules.summary: This HTB Academy REGULAR GENERAL module introduces core networking fundamentals, including internet structure, topologies, proxy roles, and communication models, essential for IT pros.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Web Requests
modules.summary: This HTB Academy REGULAR GENERAL module covers HTTP/HTTPS basics, web request fundamentals, using cURL and DevTools, with 8 sections, 6 exercises, and no assessments.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Secure Coding 101: JavaScript
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches advanced JavaScript security through code review, static/dynamic analysis, vulnerability identification, and patching, ideal for developers seeking to enhance their secure coding skills.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Using the Metasploit Framework
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches the basics of Metasploit for offensive security, covering tool usage, framework overview, module types, target setting, pivoting, and more, over 5 hours.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: JavaScript Deobfuscation
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches JavaScript deobfuscation fundamentals, including locating JavaScript code and understanding its purpose through 11 sections, 5 interactive exercises, and an assessment.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Whitebox Pentesting 101: Command Injection
modules.summary: This module teaches identifying and exploiting Command Injection vulnerabilities in NodeJS servers through hands-on exercises, suitable for Whitebox Pentesting beginners.
concepts: MITRE Technique T1046: Command and Scripting Interpreter
MITRE Technique T1552.003: Local File Discovery
MITRE Technique T1552.004: Remote File Discovery

modules.title: Windows Fundamentals
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches fundamental Windows OS skills including file system navigation, command-line use, and essential security techniques, suitable for beginners.

modules.title: Linux Privilege Escalation

modules.title: Attacking Web Applications with Ffuf
modules.summary: This HTB Academy module teaches web fuzzing and directory brute forcing with Ffuf, covering hidden page discovery and parameter fuzzing in web apps.
modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: Login Brute Forcing

modules.next_action: Review local summary, query RAG, then execute mapped CyberRange playbooks if present.

modules.title: SQLMap Essentials

modules.summary: This HTB Academy module introduces Active Directory fundamentals, covering its structure, functionality, flaws, and security measures over 7 hours.
